nasb.text: It came about after these events that his master’s wife looked with desire at Joseph, and she said, “Lie with me.”

esv.text: And after a time his master’s wife cast her eyes on Joseph and said, “Lie with me.”

cnv.text: 這些事以後，約瑟主人的妻子以目傳情給約瑟，說：“與我同睡吧。”

ccb.text: 后来，波提乏的妻子看中了约瑟，向他眉目传情，要引诱他上床。

csbs.text: 这些事以后，约瑟主人的妻子看上了约瑟，对他说：“与我同睡吧！”
